name: Children's Online Privacy Protection Act
description: Protects online privacy of children under 13
penalty_authority: Civil penalties up to $50,120 per violation

requirements.title: Privacy Policy
requirements.description: Website or online service must post a clear and comprehensive privacy policy

requirements.title: Parental Consent
requirements.description: Must obtain verifiable parental consent before collecting personal information from children

requirements.title: Parent Access
requirements.description: Parents must be able to review and delete their child's personal information

requirements.title: Prohibition on Conditioning
requirements.description: Cannot condition participation on disclosure of more information than necessary

requirements.title: Data Security
requirements.description: Must establish reasonable procedures to protect confidentiality and security of children's data
